inline_comments.message:
here is it he driver code not a filebeat docker..

as the code did not change for a while, is it better to add a waiver or to remove this driver from the default installation
in multicloud we removed lots of "old" drivers, we could imagine to do the same in vfc
all the more as, as far as I know there is no automated tests dealing with this part of code in CI.
